name: Queen of Beggars
overview: Alborz Shams, a resident of Germany, returns to Iran for the death of his father, but in Iran everyone calls him Farhad Babaei and no one remembers him, not even his love Sara.

trailers.title: Serial Malakeye Gedayan - Teaser Ghesmat 1 | سريال ملکه گدایان - تیزر قسمت 1
